_comment: G1(IMP60-13) adjacent-path smoke. NOTE: GC pause is SD-server-only (no-op in P2P) and dropSpawn is symmetric (no desync) — neither triggers G1's desync paths; desyncPeak stays 0 by design. This exercises reconnect→FullState restore (ClearPerPeerDesyncState reset sites) + roster churn under RTT stress.
